title: Ability to create Doc column type in Board via API
excerpt:
Hi, 
For the moment there is no support for creating a column of type Monday Doc via API. I would like to know if and when we could expect a solution for this? 
Thanks in advance for your help, 
Bests, 
Jean-Luc

posts.author: JeanLucT (Jean-Luc T)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

For the moment there is no support for creating a column of type Monday Doc via API. I would like to know if and when we could expect a solution for this?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @JeanLucT,

We do not have an ETA for this.

Everyone, you can vote for this request at the top of this screen!
